steps.title: Find the initial value
steps.content:
Use the exponential form $h(x)=a\cdot b^x$. The row with $x=0$ gives the initial value.
$$h(0)=a\cdot b^0=a=1.36$$

steps.title: Find the growth factor
steps.content:
Use the row with $x=2$ to solve for $b$.
$$1.80=1.36b^2$$
$$b^2=\frac{1.80}{1.36}\sim 1.324$$
$$b\sim 1.15$$

steps.title: Write the model
steps.content:
The model is $h(x)=1.36(1.15)^x$. It also matches the row with $x=4$ because
$$1.36(1.15)^4\sim 2.38$$
The answer is D.
